---
title: "DemonsForce"
generated: true
description: "Closed-form efficient-symmetric (ESM) Demons force (the Demons default)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._force`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:DemonsForce -->
```python
class DemonsForce
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:DemonsForce -->
Closed-form efficient-symmetric (ESM) Demons force (the Demons default).

The velocity update is $u = (F - \text{warped}) \cdot J / (|J|^2 +
\alpha^2 (F - \text{warped})^2)$ with the symmetric gradient $J =
\tfrac{1}{2}(\nabla F + \nabla\,\text{warped})$, where $F$ is the
fixed image.  The fixed gradient $\nabla F$ is hoisted by `bind`
(constant across the single-sided iterations).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:DemonsForce.bind -->
```python
bind(fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, ndim: int, rel_spacing: RelSpacing = None) -> _BoundDemons
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Bind to `fixed`, precomputing its spatial gradient.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:DemonsForce.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(alpha: float = 0.4, backend: Backend = 'jax') -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:DemonsForce -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
